executive_summary: Two new client onboardings dominate the week: **MedStation** (multi-location medical clinic) and **Maadi Law** (personal injury) both kicked off with large-scale CRM migrations and compliance setup. Full Smile's CRM handoff to the new GHL team (Ahmed/Ali) uncovered five critical bugs including a broken OpenDental→GHL sync and duplicate contacts. Billy Doe's subscription-box video ads are stalled 33 days (last touch June 10). Quality HVAC's Fibid CRM audit found seven open gaps including broken missed-call automation and technician calendar routing that sends all jobs to the wrong person. Liferun has six unverified handoff tasks—Becklar deactivation automation was spec'd in March, never confirmed built, and is the highest-risk gap in the fulfilment loop.

departments_overview.summary: Heavy load from two new client builds (MedStation 10 tasks, Maadi 9 tasks) plus Full Smile handoff that surfaced five live bugs; Quality HVAC Fibid audit in progress found seven broken automations; Liferun has six unverified March-spec'd tasks including missing Becklar deactivation.
Steady retainer work across six clients; no critical blockers but Billy Doe's July 4th creatives published 14 days late (due June 29, last touch June 29).

Billy Doe Sub Box ads stalled 33 days (last updated June 10, status 'For Review'); Full Smile 7-ad set stalled 21 days; Quality HVAC two projects stalled 63+ days; Maadi Law 10-clip request just started July 6.
Routine reporting and minor updates; Steel Round Bars website stuck since April (copy and AGS updates both marked 'Stuck'); Healing Helps email deliverability still 'In Progress' since May 28.
